====== Vehicle Game Mechanics ======

===== Ratings ======

==== Performance Rating ====

<code cpp>
Rating_Performance = Selected_Engine.Performance_Rating * 0.5
Rating_Performance = Rating_Performance + Selected_Chassis.Performance_Rating * 0.3
</code>

==== Driveability Rating ====

<code cpp>
Rating_Drivability = Selected_Chassis.Drivability_Rating * 0.4
Rating_Drivability = Rating_Drivability + SubComponent_FrSus_Steering * 0.1
Rating_Drivability = Rating_Drivability + SubComponent_RrSus_Steering * 0.1
Rating_Drivability = Rating_Drivability + Selected_Gearbox.Comfort_Rating * 0.2
</code>

==== Luxury Rating ====

<code cpp>
Rating_Luxury = Selected_Chassis.Comfort_Rating * 0.5
</code>

==== Safety Rating ====

<code cpp>
Rating_Safety = Selected_Chassis.Strength_Rating * 0.6
</code>

==== Dependability Rating ====

<code cpp>
Rating_Dependability = Selected_Chassis.Durability_Rating * 0.35
Rating_Dependability = Rating_Dependability + Selected_Engine.Reliability_Rating * 0.35
Rating_Dependability = Rating_Dependability + Selected_Gearbox.Reliability_Rating * 0.2
Rating_Dependability = Rating_Dependability + Sliders_Design_Dependability * 0.1
</code>

==== Quality Rating ====

<code cpp>
Rating_Quality = Selected_Chassis.Durability_Rating * 0.25
Rating_Quality = Rating_Quality + Selected_Engine.Reliability_Rating * 0.25
Rating_Quality = Rating_Quality + Selected_Gearbox.Reliability_Rating * 0.25
</code>

==== Overall Rating ====

<code cpp>
Rating_Overall = Rating_Performance + Rating_Drivability + Rating_Luxury
Rating_Overall = Rating_Overall + Rating_Safety + Rating_Dependability
</code>

==== Cargo Rating ====

<code cpp>
Rating_Cargo = Selected_Chassis.Cargo_Space * 0.8
</code>

==== Fuel Economy Rating ====

<code cpp>
Rating_Fuel = Selected_Engine.Fuel_Economy_Rating * 0.6
Rating_Fuel = Rating_Fuel + Selected_Gearbox.Fuel_Economy_Rating * 0.4
</code>

==== Power Rating ====

<code cpp>
Rating_Power = Selected_Engine.HP * 0.5
Rating_Power = Rating_Power + Selected_Engine.Torque * 0.05
</code>

==== Vehicle Type Rating ====

Vehicle Type Rating uses vehicle type importance weights for performance, drivability,
luxury, safety, fuel, power, cargo, and dependability.
